characters.appearance: A stylized 3D animated woman of Indian descent in her mid-20s. She has a warm, medium complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and perfectly sculpted eyebrows. Her hair is long, black, and styled in voluminous waves parted to the side.
characters.wardrobe: A bright turquoise or cyan blazer worn over a plain white crew-neck top.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, professional, and consistently smiling.

characters.appearance: A young South Indian man in his early 20s with a medium build and a dark complexion. He has thick, curly black hair styled upwards and a light mustache. His facial features are round.
characters.wardrobe: A long-sleeved, button-down collared shirt with a brown, blue, and white plaid pattern.
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant, confused, and slightly stressed, transitioning to attentive, curious, and finally convinced and decisive.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: I... will to learn English. I... uh... having interview tomorrow.
Character A says: Interview ke liye English speaking practice karni hai? Main Miss Nova hoon.
Character B says: Yes. But... lekin aap Hindi mein samjha sakti hain?
Character A says: Zaroor. Supernova par main aapki hi bhasha mein English bolna sikhati hoon.
Character B says: Haan, par main bolte waqt freeze ho jata hoon. Aur classes ke liye time nahi hai.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Relatable broken English and high-stakes interview scenario.
- Introduces Miss Nova by name and establishes the mother-tongue explanation beat.
- Sets up the core problem: freezing while speaking and lacking time.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: I... will to learn | English. | I... uh... having | interview tomorrow. | Interview ke liye | English speaking | practice karni hai? | Main Miss Nova hoon. | Yes. But... | lekin aap Hindi | mein samjha sakti hain? | Zaroor. | Supernova par main | aapki hi bhasha mein | English bolna sikhati hoon. | Haan, par main | bolte waqt freeze | ho jata hoon. | Aur classes ke liye | time nahi hai.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova try karo. Main sabko same nahi sikhati. Pehle aapka level samajhti hoon, phir sirf aapke liye plan banati hoon. Roz bas 15 minute.
Character B says: Par main toh bahut galtiyan karta hoon.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers beat (a) Personalization: analyzes level, builds custom plan.
- Sets the positive time anchor (15 minutes a day).
- Removes the competitor's 1-month guarantee to ensure brand safety.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova try karo. | Main sabko same | nahi sikhati. | Pehle aapka level | samajhti hoon, | phir sirf aapke liye | plan banati hoon. | Roz bas 15 minute. | Par main toh | bahut galtiyan | karta hoon.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Yahan aap padhte nahi, bolte ho! 1000 galtiyan karo, main 1000 baar bina hanse theek karungi. Koi aapko judge nahi karega.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers beat (c) You SPEAK, not read.
- Delivers beat (b) Privacy/no-judgement: make 1000 mistakes, no one is watching.
- Matches the visual UI of instant grammar correction.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Yahan aap padhte nahi, | bolte ho! | 1000 galtiyan karo, | main 1000 baar | bina hanse theek karungi. | Koi aapko judge | nahi karega.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Hmm. ChatGPT toh sirf text deta hai, par aap toh sach mein teacher ho.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the ChatGPT contrast beat.
- Shows the user convinced by the active teaching method versus passive AI.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Hmm. | ChatGPT toh sirf | text deta hai, | par aap toh sach mein | teacher ho.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Aaj hi Supernova app download karo. 1 crore se zyada log yahan practice kar rahe hain. Yeh coaching classes se sasta hai, aur aapke phone mein hamesha ready hai.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers social proof (1 crore+ users).
- Replaces hard rupee price with a safe comparative (cheaper than coaching classes).
- Drives the download CTA.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Aaj hi Supernova | app download karo. | 1 crore se zyada log | yahan practice kar rahe hain. | Yeh coaching classes | se sasta hai, | aur aapke phone mein | hamesha ready hai.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Abhi main phone mein download karta hoon Supernova app. Interview clear karna hai!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the high-stakes interview scenario.
- Shows user taking immediate action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Abhi main phone mein | download karta hoon | Supernova app. | Interview clear | karna hai!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Install Supernova, start speaking today.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Clean, tight final CTA.
- Reinforces the core action: speaking.

payload_audit.beats_covered: a (personalization), b (privacy/no-judgement), c (you speak), e (interview scenario), g (logic in mother-tongue), ChatGPT contrast
payload_audit.kept_from_seed: Split-screen AI tutor and stressed learner format
payload_audit.price_check: No hard rupee figure; used comparative 'coaching classes se sasta hai'
